title: Annual Giving
description: Annual gifts provide a foundation of support for RAND and a primary base for addressing RAND and the RAND School of Public Policy's greatest needs.
text:
Annual gifts provide a foundation of support for RAND and a primary base for addressing RAND and the RAND School of Public Policy's greatest needs. An annual gift is an easy way to make a difference and help RAND solve the world's most pressing problems.
Areas of Support
RAND Policy Society
The RAND Policy Society is a community of philanthropists who provide foundational support of $1,000 – $24,999 annually and serve as informed ambassadors of RAND.
PRESIDENT'S CIRCLE
$10,000 – $24,999
INNOVATION CIRCLE
$5,000 – $9,999
ANALYST CIRCLE
$2,500 – $4,999
1948 CIRCLE
$1,000 – $2,499
RAND Dean's Society
The Dean's Society consists of philanthropic individuals who are committed to supporting the graduate school's greatest needs with an annual gift of at least $1,000.
THE CHARLES WOLF, JR. FOUNDER'S CIRCLE
$50,000+
LEADERSHIP CIRCLE
$25,000 – $49,999
PARTNER
$10,000 – $24,999
INNOVATOR
$5,000 – $9,999
SCHOLAR
$1,000 – $4,999
Donors who make a leadership gift to RAND or the RAND School of Public Policy receive Policy Society and/or Dean's Society recognition for the duration of one year. A designated RAND staff liaison will help keep Policy Society and Dean's Society supporters informed and engaged.
Matching Gifts
Many employers sponsor matching gift programs and offer matching funds that may double or triple any charitable contributions made by their employees. To find out if your company has a matching gift policy, please enter your employer's name below. If your company is eligible, request a matching gift form from your employer and send it completed and signed with your gift.
